section_en: Compositions of Extracts or Essences for Cognac

ingredients.note: proportion by weight, not made up to volume

steps_en: Combine the acetic ether, wood spirit, and sweet niter spirit.
Add the alcohol of 90° in the stated proportion to form the concentrated ether.
notes_en: Table gives relative parts by weight for a concentrated cognac ether, distinct from the two essence recipes that are diluted to 1 liter with alcohol.

title_en: Essence for Fine Cognac Champagne (Kölling or Schmidt)
title_it: Essenza per Cognac fine Champagne (Kölling o Schmidt)
section_en: Compositions of Extracts or Essences for Cognac

ingredients.note: quantity sufficient to complete to 1 liter

steps_en: Mix the cocoa ether, tincture of gall nuts, butyric ether, essence of grape pips, formic acid and vanillin.
Add 90° alcohol to bring the total volume to 1 liter.
notes_en: Attributed to Kölling or Schmidt; used to flavor fine Cognac Champagne style spirits.

title_en: Essence of Cognac of the Rhine
section_en: Compositions of Extracts or Essences for Cognac

ingredients.note: quantity sufficient to complete to 1 liter

steps_en: Combine the lemon oil, acetic ether, vanillin, essence of grape pips, and balsam of Peru.
Add 90° alcohol to bring the total volume to 1 liter.
notes_en: A Rhine-style cognac essence distinguished by the inclusion of Balsam of Peru.
